name: Demo Toyota
description: Auto Agent Protocol dealer agent for Demo Toyota — browse inventory and submit consented leads over A2A.

extensions.description: Auto Agent Protocol v0.2 — A2A Automotive Retail Profile.

skills.name: Dealer Information
skills.description: Return the dealership profile: group name, welcome message, and rooftops with address, hours, contacts, and capabilities.

skills.name: Inventory Facets
skills.description: Return aggregated facets (makes, models, years, conditions, price/mileage ranges, statuses) over the dealer's inventory.

skills.name: Inventory Search
skills.description: Search the dealer's vehicle inventory by make, model, year, condition, price, mileage, body, fuel, drivetrain, VIN, or stock.

skills.name: Vehicle Detail
skills.description: Return full detail for a specific vehicle by VIN, stock number, or vehicle_id.

skills.name: Submit Lead
skills.description: Submit a consented lead with optional vehicle of interest, trade-in, and appointment.
